Appearances:
Plaintiff Dane & Mary Giosso Family Lp is present. Represented by Denise Hart.
Attorney Philip Keith appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Rafael Fuentes, Pinto De Jesus Natalia is present.
Attorney Nathaniel Bigger representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Zadik Shapiro, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of APR-02-2012 is vacated. (501/REQ)
